     the Fermi energy is    -0.4635 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.29247841 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08750299 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.20497542 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -237029.93809479 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  119612.95749491 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4202.93887421 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  109884.71856383 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.00406516 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.77 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  32 iterations

     negative rho (up, down):  5.310E-03 5.019E-03
